title: Usopp Backs Luffy Up
description: On pages 4–7, usopp backs luffy up as usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart.
scene: Usopp Backs Luffy Up. Usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You've gone too far, prepare to die!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Alright, Luffy! We've got you backed up!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is this the end... of our struggle, little one...?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: "It's time for someone else to do the struggling....

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Let's get this started then, shall we!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: My legs look like a hammer now...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: That was too easy... next up are your hands!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: The hell is he trying to do!?

summary: This part centers on usopp backs luffy up, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
